regional_cost_note: Upper Hutt builders charge similar Wellington metro rates — $88–$120/hr. Strong residential renovation market with aging 1970s–80s housing stock.

businesses.name: Kariba Construction
businesses.known_for: Residential builds and renovations across the Wellington region, specialising in challenging site conditions.

businesses.name: Vert Construction Ltd
businesses.known_for: Hutt Valley family business with 15+ years experience in design and build, renovations and project management.

businesses.name: Impact Building & Landscaping Ltd
businesses.known_for: Renovations, landscaping and custom builds with 25 years of experience in the Wellington/Porirua region.

businesses.name: Hanna Construction Ltd
businesses.known_for: New homes and renovations by a Master Builders member with 30+ years in the industry since 1986.

businesses.name: JVSL Construction Limited
businesses.known_for: Family-owned construction company with 25 years experience in project management, renovations and roofing.

businesses.name: Building Detail Ltd

businesses.name: Buildstrong
businesses.known_for: Residential renovations, additions, decking and fencing by a licensed building practitioner with 20 years self-employment.
